body:
Currently the user may pass `diffusivity_fields` into model constructors, but `Oceananigans.TurbulantClosures.DiffusivityFields` resets these to the value of `validate_field_tuple_grid` which nominally is `nothing`. I have changed this to return the field values if `validate_field_tuple_grid` does not error instead.

E.g.

```julia

using Oceananigans
using Oceananigans.TurbulenceClosures: DiffusivityFields

grid = RectilinearGrid(size = (64, 64, 16), extent = (150, 150, 10))

tracers = (:T, :S)

closure = AnisotropicMinimumDissipation()

diffusivity_fields = diffusivity_fields = DiffusivityFields(grid, tracers, NamedTuple(), closure)

model = NonhydrostaticModel(; grid,
                              tracers,
                              closure,
                              diffusivity_fields)
```

labels.description: Even a perfect program still has bugs
labels.name: bug 🐞

title: Fixes bug with pre-defining diffusivity fields
